type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: During an inventory review, we noted that the Denaturant tanks were listed incorrectly as having "Gunite lining";  this was a historical error as they have a steel wall. Gunite lining factor is around100 times higher than the factor used for steel. Therefore, emissions from denaturant tanks decreased based on the revised tank material lining. Emissions from the tanks were overestimated in previously submitted reports
